subtitle: AI Strategy & Governance Leader -- AI Architecture Evaluation | Production ML Governance | Enterprise Operating Depth
summary_text: Senior technology executive with a structured, repeatable methodology for evaluating, governing, and deploying enterprise AI -- now seeking to apply that discipline to a Center of Excellence build. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation; built a scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, and evaluation flow adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare generative and agentic AI platforms across enterprise environments with explicit treatment of governance, integration fit, vendor lock-in, and failure modes at scale. Earlier: 14 years as the first CTO at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB) -- where I deployed production ML via DataRobot under model governance, owned enterprise data architecture end-to-end, and governed cross-functional technology decisions across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders. 17 years before that as founder of DMLCo, a web/IT consulting firm with full P&L.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms across NICE / Genesys-tier solutions and AI-focused startups, with explicit treatment of governance, integration fit, vendor lock-in, and failure modes at scale.

Provide client-facing AI advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions for enterprise environments.

Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; running an LLM-assisted pipeline (career-ops-dml on Node.js + Claude API + Playwright + Go) extended alongside Claude Code as a working pair-programmer.

Published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn -- including the limits of orchestration layers in current agentic deployments.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions under regulatory governance with model accuracy, drift, and adoption monitoring.

Led full enterprise contact center AI transformation -- intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots (human-in-the-loop AI throughout) -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live.

Built Enterprise PMO from scratch and operated a multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders -- the same governance discipline an AI CoE intake function requires; delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence on a $30-50M annual portfolio.

Spearheaded multi-year transition to a digital-first, cloud-first, security-first model; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance.

Owned vendor governance across the full vendor lifecycle: SoW authorship, vendor budget and burn-rate tracking, multi-year vendor relationships, and resource leveling across in-house, nearshore, and offshore teams.

Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team across data, infrastructure, software engineering, and global vendor partners; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; 4-5 board engagements per year over 8-year CTO tenure.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go) -- live agentic-adjacent practice.

skills.items: AI Architecture Evaluation, AI Governance, AI/ML Guardrails, Generative AI, Agentic AI, LLM Platforms, Model Drift Monitoring, Responsible AI Practice
DataRobot (Production ML), Data Warehousing, Data Governance, Cross-Functional Data Definitions, Power BI, Tableau
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, Azure OpenAI (Architectural), GitHub, Microsoft 365, SharePoint, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
Enterprise Architecture, API Governance, Integration Patterns, RAG (Architectural), Vendor Architecture Evaluation
Enterprise PMO Governance, Multi-Factor Prioritization, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap, Build-Buy-Partner, Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
